candidate_definition_hints.text: Sets of "panels" for testing Rally (AskRally.com) exploring various "frontier" applications for the concept of AI personas and simulated voting bodies and thinking groups

A collection of panel configurations and persona system prompts for [Rally](https://askrally.com) - a platform for creating virtual focus groups comprised of AI agents representing diverse perspectives.
